betOfDay.analysis: The Rockets are a top-5 team in the Western Conference and one of the most dominant home teams in the NBA. The Pelicans are one of the worst teams in the league, with one of the worst road records going. -5.5 is locked in at the same number across DraftKings, FanDuel, and BetMGM — no line movement means sharp money agrees. Rockets cover easily at home.

picks.reasoning: Line locked at -5.5 across all major books — zero movement means sharps agree. Rockets are a top-5 West team playing at home vs the Pelicans, who are one of the worst franchises in the NBA right now. Home crowd, better roster, better coach. Lay the points with confidence.

Wolves have one of the best defenses in the NBA and are a legitimate Western Conference contender. Warriors have been inconsistent at home late in the season. Minnesota is the better team and -5.5 at -105 on DraftKings is excellent value.

Clippers at home are a reliable cover spot. Bulls are one of the weaker road teams in the East — they struggle against physical, athletic teams like LA. Line sits at -13 on FanDuel, -13.5 DK and MGM. Taking the better number on FanDuel.

Oilers are one of the elite teams in the NHL with McDavid leading the charge. Blues are a mid-tier team at home but getting -148 on a team of Edmonton's caliber is reasonable. Don't overthink this — back the better team on the ML.

research.nba: Friday slate — 8 NBA games tonight. Four early games already in progress at 6 PM MT (Pistons, Pacers, Raptors, Mavs). Key picks from upcoming games: Rockets vs Pelicans (6:10 PM MT), Wolves @ Warriors (8:10 PM MT), Clippers vs Bulls (8:40 PM MT). Several additional games Saturday.
research.nhl: Massive NHL Friday with 16 games across the weekend slate. Oilers @ Blues leads our NHL card. Winnipeg Jets vs Colorado Avalanche and Minnesota Wild vs NY Rangers are intriguing Saturday matchups.
